summary: Excellent soundboard capture that highlights Jerry's deliberately dirty tone while delivering a clean, inebriated performance.
review: The taper’s work is praised for faithfully reproducing the intentional distortion that Jerry embraced on this night, resulting in an excellent‑ sounding recording. Reviewers describe the playing as clean and well performed, noting that repeated listening will reveal deeper intimacy with the show. Overall the musical delivery and technical capture are both highly regarded.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review lauds both the performance (especially Jerry's tone) and the recording quality, indicating an outstanding show with excellent soundboard capture.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Captures intentional distortion clearly; taper praised for clean mix and faithful reproduction of Jerry's dirty tone.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer focuses on overall performance quality and tonal character.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His deliberately dirty tone is highlighted throughout, described as clean yet inebriated and well performed.
